title: A security management system
abstract: The present invention discloses a security management system comprising: a server in communication with a plurality of user mobile devices and a security point having an alarm system and at least one display unit via a communication network; wherein the server includes an alert module configured to transmit an instruction that sounds the alarm system upon receiving an alert signal from the user mobile devices; wherein the server includes a visitor module configured to transmit details of a visitor to the display unit for display upon receiving visitor details from the user mobile devices; characterised in that the user mobile devices comprises an application to provide a first interface having a virtual button for transmitting the alert signal to the server, and a second interface to allow a user to input the visitor details and to transmit the visitor details to the server.
claims:
Claims 1. A security management system comprising: a server (2) in communication with a plurality of user mobile devices (3) and a security point (1) having an alarm system (11) and at least one display unit via a communication network; wherein the server (2) includes an alert module configured to transmit an instruction that sounds the alarm system (11) upon receiving an alert signal from the user mobile devices (3); wherein the server (2) includes a visitor module configured to transmit details of a visitor to the display unit for display upon receiving visitor details from the user mobile devices (3); characterised in that the user mobile devices (3) comprises an application to provide a first interface having a virtual button for transmitting the alert signal to the server (2), and a second interface to allow a user to input the visitor details and to transmit the visitor details to the server (2); 2. A system according to claim 1, wherein the server (2) is further in communication with a database, having a location module to determine the house address of the user by matching information from the alert signal with those stored in the database and to further transmit the address information to the display unit for display. 3. A system according to claim 2, wherein the location module is further configured to determine at least one preset user and further instructs the alert module to generate and transmit a notification message to mobile devices of the user. 4. A system according to claim 1, wherein the server (2) is further in communication with at least one guard mobile device (4), having an acknowledgement module for 

 transmitting an acknowledgement message to the user mobile device (3) which triggers the alert signal upon receiving acknowledgement signal from the guard mobile device (4). 5. A system according to claim 4, wherein the guard mobile device (4) comprises a guard application to provide a first interface having a virtual button for transmitting the acknowledgement signal to the server (2). 6. A system according to claim 5, wherein the guard mobile device (4) is coupled with a camera to capture image. 7. A system according to claim 6, wherein the guard application comprises an encryption module to encrypt the captured image. 8. A system according to claim 6, wherein the guard application comprises a watermark module to provide watermarking on the captured image. 9. A system according to claim 6, wherein the guard application comprises an optical character recognition module to convert content of the captured image into editable and searchable data. 10. A system according to claim 5, wherein the guard mobile device (4) is coupled with a card reader to read data from a card-shaped storage medium. 11. A system according to claim 5, wherein the guard application further provides a second interface for registering incoming visitor. 12. A system according to claim 4, wherein the server (2) further includes a guard patrol monitoring system to monitor the movement of the guard via the guard mobile 

 device (4). 13. A system according to claim 5, wherein the guard mobile device (4) comprises a global positioning system for periodically determining the location of the guard mobile device (4) and transmitting the location information to the server (2). 14. A system according to claim 4, wherein the visitor details is also transmitted to the guard mobile device (4) for display. 15. A system according to claim 1, wherein the security point (1) further comprises a printer for printing a visitor receipt upon receiving the visitor details from the server (2). 16. A system according to claim 1, wherein the server (2) further includes a social media platform configured to provide interactive messaging service, images or video uploading and sharing service, or a combination thereof. 17. A system according to claim 16, wherein the application of the user mobile devices (3) further provide a third interface to carry out the services provided by the social media platform. 18. A system according to claim 1, wherein the server (2) further includes a payment module configured to process and execute payment transactions. 19. A system according to claim 18, wherein the application of the user mobile devices (3) further provide a fourth interface for the user to initiate a payment transaction. 20. A system according to claim 1, wherein the server (2) is further in communication 

 with a user database, having a user module to provide and manage a plurality of user accounts and to assign different type of user accounts with different level of accessibilities to the operations of the application. 21. A system according to claim 20, wherein the user module provides at least one admin account which can access to the full operations of the application. 22. A system according to claim 20 or claim 21, wherein the user module provides at least one resident account which only has restricted access to the operations of the application. 23. A system according to any one of claims 20 to 22, wherein the user mobile devices (3) is provided with a verification process for the user to login the application. 24. A system according to any one of claims 20 to 23, wherein the user mobile devices (3) is provided with an authentication process for verification. 25. A system according to any one of claims 20 to 24, wherein the application of the user mobile devices (3) further provide a fifth interface for users of the admin account to add or accept new account registration. 26. A system according to claim 1, wherein the server (2) further includes a vendor module configured to manage registered vendors and their accessibility of entering a residential area through the security point (1). 27. A system according to claim 26, wherein the application of the user mobile devices (3) further provide a sixth interface for the user to input the details of the vendors and to further transmit the vendors details to the server (2). 28. A system according to claim 1, wherein the alarm system (11) comprises: an alarm device; a LED display unit; a modem (7); a core unit (5) linking the alarm device, the LED display unit, and the modem (7); and a power supply (8) for supplying electrical energy to alarm system (11); wherein the core unit (5) includes a microprocessor (6) for processing instructions from the server (2) and for operating the alarm device and the LED display unit according to the received instructions, and a control board (10) coupled with a power source for switching on/off the alarm device. 29. A system according to claim 28, wherein the control board (10) comprises: a transistor and a pair of diodes for directing electrical power to a relay (14) from the microcontroller (6); wherein the relay (14) is connected to a second power source (12) for sounding the alarm device via the screw terminal and the relay (14) is powered by the microcontroller (6) to switch on the alarm device. 30. A system according to claim 4 and claim 28, wherein the server (2) further includes an audio and video module configured to facilitate a visual and/or audio channel between the user mobile devices (3) and the guard mobile device (4) to establish the visual and/or audio communication. 31. A system according to claim 1 and claim 4, wherein the security point (1) is further provided with a kiosk terminal, the kiosk terminal comprises: a body with a slot for receiving the guard mobile device (4); a handset connected to the guard mobile device (4), having an audio receiver and transmitter; and wherein the server (2) includes an audio and video module to facilitate a visual and/or 

 audio channel between the user mobile devices (3) and the guard mobile device (4) to establish the visual and/or audio communication; and wherein the handset is provided with a button for triggering an action of answering a visual and/or audio call.
